title: Psychedelic-assisted Therapy as a Promising Treatment for Irritable Bowel Syndrome.

assets.abstract: Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) is prevalent and can be disabling. Many patients remain symptomatic despite behavioral and medical therapies. Psychedelic-assisted therapy (PAT), in which serotonergic agents like psilocybin are administered in a psychotherapeutic context, has shown promise for refractory psychiatric disorders, including major depressive disorder and post-traumatic stress disorder. Emerging evidence suggests PAT may also be beneficial for chronic pain conditions, including fibromya

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.
